programs.programName: Virginia Insurance Counseling and Assistance Program (VICAP)

verified.notes: VICAP is a SHIP (State Health Insurance Assistance Program) offering free counseling on Medicare and health insurance options. No eligibility restrictions (age, income, or asset limits) are documented in available sources; the program serves all Medicare beneficiaries including those under 65 with disabilities. Phone number confirmed from official CMS and Virginia DARS sources.

verified.notes: No specific monthly income limits found; eligibility is income-based at 125% FPL per federal guidelines but exact 2026 USD figures unavailable in sources
